parents.subject: LU-9776 lustre-client cannot be installed if both client and server repos are configured

commit.subject: LU-9798 test: Separate server recovery tests
commit.message:
LU-9798 test: Separate server recovery tests

Run the MDS and OST failover tests that are currently run by recovery-mds-scale with two separate test sets:
recovery-mds-scale
recovery-ost-scale

Test-Parameters: envdefinitions="SLOW=yes" clientcount=4 osscount=2 ostcount=7 mdscount=2 mdtcount=1 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 testlist=recovery-mds-scale,recovery-ost-scale

Change-Id: Ie6cd302c564dcc6fca1ae289f037fedfab56bcf5
Signed-off-by: Jim Casper <jamesx.casper@intel.com>
